title: cistanthe lingulata
intro: Cistanthe lingulata, also known as Chorispora tenella, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mustard family. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and fungal infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Cistanthe lingulata is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
